summary: Re-verified SSR on PREVIEW environment. All 18 SSR SEO tests pass. Preview is serving full server-rendered HTML with H1/H2/canonical/JSON-LD schemas and zero 'enable JavaScript' occurrences. Production URL was NOT tested per instructions — user must redeploy to push the fix.

All other target routes (services/luxury-escort-hamburg, escort/hamburg, models/aurelia, blog article) confirmed with proper H1/canonical/JSON-LD.

All required H1/H2/canonical/JSON-LD (Organization, WebSite, LocalBusiness, FAQPage, Service, Place, Person, Article) are present in raw HTML with no JS execution required.
